propositions: CLAUDE.md's gate-enforcement template section should direct plan authors to the criteria guide and `rebar explain <criterion-id>` before writing a plan, naming the blocking-tier criterion ids.
docs/plan-review-gate.md states a stale 0.70 block threshold for the calibration-2 criteria (F1/E2/G5/T5e/COH/G6) that no longer matches criteria_routing.json.
The gate doc's thresholds should reflect the 0.60 tier for calibration-2 criteria, the 0.70 tier for T1/T4/T8/G1G2, and the 0.75 tier for E4.
The gate doc should document that remediation-mode eligibility currently requires a prior certified PASS signature, so the rising floor does not engage during BLOCK loops.
This is a docs-only change with no runtime behavior impact that must pass the commit gate's pre-commit hook.
